mapper.sql: ID AS id, SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID AS socialAccountId, ALIAS AS alias, RECEIVER_NAME AS receiverName, RECEIVER_PHONE AS receiverPhone, ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, ADDRESS AS address, ADDRESS_DETAIL AS addressDetail, MEMO AS memo, IS_DEFAULT AS isDefault, CRE_TM AS creTm, UPT_TM AS uptTm
mapper.insert: /* DeliveryAddress.insert */ INSERT INTO TB_DELIVERY_ADDRESS ( SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID, ALIAS, RECEIVER_NAME, RECEIVER_PHONE, ZIP_CODE, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DETAIL, MEMO, IS_DEFAULT ) VALUES ( #{socialAccountId}, #{alias}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{zipCode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{memo}, #{isDefault} )
mapper.update: /* DeliveryAddress.update */ UPDATE TB_DELIVERY_ADDRESS SET ALIAS = #{alias}, RECEIVER_NAME = #{receiverName}, RECEIVER_PHONE = #{receiverPhone}, ZIP_CODE = #{zipCode}, ADDRESS = #{address}, ADDRESS_DETAIL = #{addressDetail}, MEMO = #{memo}, IS_DEFAULT = #{isDefault}, UPT_TM = NOW() WHERE ID = #{id} AND SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID = #{socialAccountId}
/* DeliveryAddress.clearDefault */ UPDATE TB_DELIVERY_ADDRESS SET IS_DEFAULT = 'N', UPT_TM = NOW() WHERE SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID = #{socialAccountId} AND IS_DEFAULT = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N'
